title: Asia's Stuck Generation | Documentary
description: Documentary exploring how young graduates cope with low pay and high costs.
longDescription: A documentary examining how Taiwan's young university graduates navigate stagnant wages and rising living costs. The film follows everyday workers as they share coping strategies and question the promise of higher education.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Taiwan

videos.title: Stuck With Low Pay, How Taiwan's Young Graduates Cope With High Costs | Asia's Stuck Generation.

title: Jasmine Sokko | Documentary
description: Documentary featuring singer Jasmine Sokko on chasing music dreams.
longDescription: A short documentary profiling Singaporean electronic-pop artist Jasmine Sokko and her journey chasing music dreams. Part of the 'Dear Singapore' series, the film explores the personal sacrifices and creative vision behind her rise.
heading: Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

videos.title: Singer Jasmine Sokko On Chasing Her Music Dreams: Every Dream Is Equally Worthy | Dear Singapore

title: Fun转时光 | Documentary Series
description: Documentary series exploring Singapore's heritage and nostalgic locations.
longDescription: A five-part Mandarin-language documentary series revisiting Singapore's heritage districts and the memories they hold. Each episode uncovers the history of an iconic location — from Katong's beauty pageants to Fort Canning's playgrounds and the legendary satay club.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

videos.title: Fun转时光 | 彻夜卷发、鱼尾狮穿上身 80年代美姐难当! - Katong

Fun转时光 | 皇家山六七十年代超好玩 探索昔日回忆的三宝! - Fort Canning
Fun转时光 | "五丛树脚"吃沙爹 老一辈独有的吃法 - Satay Club
Fun转时光 | 桥北路消失的光影记忆：光华大戏院 - Jubilee Theatre

title: Into The Gym | Johnson Health Tech Web Series
description: Web series 'Into The Gym' following fitness journeys and celebrity workouts.
longDescription: A nine-episode Taiwanese web series pairing host Kunda with athletes and celebrities for fitness challenges and gym workouts.
heading: Executive Producer | 📍 Taiwan

title: Lunch With Us | Food Series
description: Food exploration series discovering hidden gems and local flavors.
longDescription: A four-episode food series exploring affordable local eats in Singapore and Taiwan. From hawker stalls and Michelin-rated meals under S$6 to old-school bento shops and a singing taxi driver's favourite eatery, each episode celebrates everyday food culture.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore & Taiwan

videos.title: Budget 'Fast-Food' Hopping In Taiwan: From Vegetarian to Pork Cheap Eats | Taipei
S$6 Michelin Meals at Indian-Pakistani Hawker Stall in Tekka | Singapore
Taiwan-style Bento Meals With Old-School Touch & Retro Vibe | Taipei
Taiwan's Karaoke Cabbie Takes Us To Comfort Food 'Club' | Taipei

title: Ministry of Manpower | Corporate Video
description: Corporate video for Singapore's Ministry of Manpower.
longDescription: A corporate video produced for Singapore's Ministry of Manpower highlighting the annual Dormitory Awards. The piece showcases best practices in foreign-worker dormitory management and celebrates operators who provide safe, well-maintained living conditions.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

title: SCDF | Documentary
description: Documentary following Singapore Civil Defence Force emergency services.
longDescription: A two-part documentary embedded with Singapore Civil Defence Force paramedics and emergency responders.

title: I Fell | Scam Documentary
description: Documentary series about scam victims sharing their stories.
longDescription: A two-part documentary giving voice to scam victims in Singapore. Each episode follows a real person recounting how they were drawn into an investment or love scam, what warning signs they missed, and how they rebuilt afterward.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

videos.title: I Fell For An Investment Scam: Here's How They Got Me
I Fell For A Love Scam: How They Made It Seem So Real

title: Work In Singapore | Documentary
description: Documentary about working life in Singapore and giving back.
longDescription: A documentary profiling a robotics professional who chose to build his career in Singapore and the ways he gives back to the community. The film explores work culture, immigration and belonging.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

videos.title: I Build Robots For A Living. Here's Why I Chose To Work In Singapore & How I'm Giving Back

title: Stay-At-Home Dad | Documentary
description: Documentary about a stay-at-home dad's 14-year journey.
longDescription: A documentary following a Singaporean father who spent 14 years as a stay-at-home dad raising his son. The film captures his reflections on sacrifice, identity and the decision to re-enter the workforce.
heading: Producer | Director | Videographer | 📍 Singapore

videos.title: I Spent 14 Years As A Stay-At-Home Dad For My Son. Here's Why It's Time To Reclaim My Life
